knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL T9-035-Configuration-Rule-Engine Control Catalog
knowledgeAssets.summary: The deterministic controls for this package. Enforced as executable rules: RE-015 (the universal AI-execution-boundary / cross-tenant controls). The remaining controls are carried here for traceability; detailed field-vs-literal rule tuning is a follow-up (see the hand-authored T9-001..010 packages for the target).
knowledgeAssets.contentText: RE-001 Rule registration | Governance | Require documented compliance: Rule registration | Critical | Architecture. RE-002 Rule owner | Governance | Require documented compliance: Rule owner | Critical | Architecture. RE-003 Version approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Version approval | Critical | Architecture. RE-004 Effective dating | Governance | Require documented compliance: Effective dating | Critical | Architecture. RE-005 Threshold approval | Evidence | Require documented evidence: Threshold approval | Critical | Architecture. RE-006 Formula approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Formula approval | Critical | Architecture. RE-007 Test coverage | Governance | Require documented compliance: Test coverage | Critical | Architecture. RE-008 Deployment approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Deployment approval | Critical | Architecture. RE-009 Rollback | Corrective | Execute recovery/rollback procedure | Critical | Architecture. RE-010 Conflict detection | Detective | Flag/alert on detected condition | Critical | Architecture. RE-011 Precedence | Governance | Require documented compliance: Precedence | Critical | Architecture. RE-012 Simulation | Governance | Require documented compliance: Simulation | Critical | Architecture. RE-013 Audit trail | Evidence | Require documented evidence: Audit trail | Critical | Architecture. RE-014 AI modification prohibition | Preventive | Deny AI permission for: AI modification prohibition | Critical | AI Governance. RE-015 Cross-tenant denial | Preventive | Deny cross-tenant access | Critical | Security. RE-016 Domain approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Domain approval | High | Architecture. RE-017 Change impact | Governance | Require documented compliance: Change impact | High | Architecture. RE-018 Emergency change | Governance | Require documented compliance: Emergency change | High | Architecture. RE-019 Calendar governance | Governance | Require documented compliance: Calendar governance | High | Architecture. RE-020 Severity mapping | Governance | Require documented compliance: Severity mapping | High | Architecture. RE-021 Configuration encryption | Governance | Require documented compliance: Configuration encryption | High | Architecture. RE-022 Secrets exclusion | Governance | Require documented compliance: Secrets exclusion | High | Architecture. RE-023 Monitoring | Detective | Flag/alert on detected condition | High | Architecture. RE-024 Retirement | Governance | Require documented compliance: Retirement | High | Architecture. RE-025 Recovery | Corrective | Execute recovery/rollback procedure | High | Architecture.
